news.text: Our team consisting of Dr. Priyanka, Dr. Moonis, and Dr. Vivek were shortlisted for the MoPR Hackathon.
Vivek Anand won the Best Paper Award in the Emerging Technologies category at SIAT 2026 by the Automotive Research Association of India (ARAI).
New Journal Publication: 'Transfer Learning for Identifying Rainwater Harvesting Sites in Training Data-Scarce Catchments' accepted in Scientific Reports.
New Journal Publication: 'Integrating Lumped Hydrological Modelling with GIS-Based Flow Accumulation for Spatiotemporal Streamflow Estimation' published in Environmental Modelling & Software.
New Journal Publication: 'Cross-modality learning between Aerial and Mobile LiDAR for Vegetation Segmentation' published in International Journal of Remote Sensing.

New Journal Publication: 'Towards Closing the Sim-to-Real Gap for Autonomous Vehicles: A Physics-Guided Learning Approach for LiDAR Intensity Simulation' published in IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems.
New Journal Publication: 'Ke-MLS: A Large-scale Labeled Mobile Lidar Data Set from Indian Urban Region' published in Environment and Planning B: Urban Analytics and City Science.
New Journal Publication: 'Terrestrial and Airborne Laser Scanning Dataset of Trees in the Shivalik Range, India with Field Measurements and Leaf–Wood Classifications' published in Scientific Data.
New Journal Publication: 'Advancing vegetation segmentation from ALS point clouds: From benchmarking to GreenSegNet-A' published in Science of Remote Sensing.
New Journal Publication: 'Modeling Point Cloud Distortions in Mobile Laser Scanning for Surveying' published in Journal of Surveying Engineering, ASCE.
Moonis Ali won the Best Paper Award at IEEE InGARSS 2025, IIIT Bhubaneswar, for work on tree volume upscaling using LiDAR.

New Journal Publication: 'Improving Micro Rainwater Harvesting Site Selection with High-Resolution LiDAR DEMs: A GIS-Based Multi-Criteria Approach' published in Remote Sensing Applications: Society and Environment.
New Journal Publication: 'A Hybrid Approach for Enhanced Tree Volume Estimation of Complex Trees Using Terrestrial LiDAR' published in GIScience & Remote Sensing.
New Journal Publication: 'Advancing LiDAR Intensity Simulation through Learning with Novel Physics-Based Modalities' published in IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems.
New Indian patent filed: a system and method for scenario generation using video for autonomous vehicles.
SimDaaS Autonomy, a lab spin-off, receives seed funding at a ₹32 Cr post-money valuation.
